issue_summary: Fix DST cutover issues for LocalDate.toInterval() [2487417 Raised by Luc Claes
javadoc_before:
/** * Converts this object to an Interval representing the whole day. *

* This instance is immutable and unaffected by this method call. * * @param zone the zone to get the Interval in, null means default * @return a interval over the day */
javadoc_after:
/** * Converts this object to an Interval representing the whole day. *

* The interval may have more or less than 24 hours if this is a daylight * savings cutover date. *

* This instance is immutable and unaffected by this method call. * * @param zone the zone to get the Interval in, null means default * @return a interval over the day */
